result.title: NVIDIA GTC Telecom Special Address: The AI Grid—Intelligently Connecting AI Infrastructure
result.description:
At NVIDIA GTC 2026, NVIDIA Telecom SVP Ronnie Vasishta delivered the Telecom Special address, exploring how telcos can build a distributed AI grid to power new AI services and applications.

In this talk, he shares a first look at NVIDIA’s reference architecture, highlights edge AI applications that run best on this grid, and announces partners already on this journey.

Learn more about AI Grids: https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/industries/telecommunications/ai-grid/

result.title: Jensen Huang on How He reasons Toward What Must Exist, Then Builds Toward It
result.description:
Curiosity first. Conviction next.

On the latest Lex Fridman podcast, NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang shares how he reasons toward what must exist, then builds toward it.

Watch the full episode with Lex Fridman ➡️ https://nvda.ws/4v4FVvk

result.title: NVIDIA GTC 2026 Keynote with Jensen Huang Highlights
result.description:
Catch up on how CEO Jensen Huang’s keynote lit the fuse on a new era of token-powered, full‑stack AI — from CUDA to Vera Rubin, Feynman and OpenClaw.

From the inflection point of inference to agentic AI to the data center, get the highlights of Jensen’s talk and the go deep by watching full replay or GTC sessions on demand.

www.nvidia.com/gtc/keynote

#NVIDIAGTC #AgenticAI #NVIDIAAI

result.title: NVIDIA GTC 2026 Event Moments: Innovation, Energy and Community
result.description:
Experience the magic of NVIDIA GTC 2026 featuring GTC Live pregame, CEO Jensen Huang’s keynote, a packed exhibit hall with hundreds of sponsors, hands-on training, technology plus fun at GTC Park, and so much more. 

Feel the excitement of our packed exhibit hall showing off cutting-edge demos, attendees at expert-led sessions, and ecosystem collaborations across AI and accelerated computing. Thank you to all the attendees, developers, creators, and sponsors who made GTC unforgettable. Watch and celebrate the moments that brought GTC to life!

www.nvidia.com/gtc
#NVIDIAGTC, #AgenticAI, #NVIDIAAI

result.title: Quantum Computing Reaches an Inflection Point With NVIDIA NVQLink | GTC 2026
result.description: At GTC, NVIDIA made NVQLink publicly available through a new application programming interface (API) called cudaq-realtime — and shared demonstrations advancing the state-of-the-art in quantum error correction. Hear Nicholas Harrigan, product marketing manager for quantum computing at NVIDIA, explain why quantum processors needs GPU supercomputers.
